overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic coastal city promenade. The character moves from a covered walkway with orange canopy structures to an open waterfront sidewalk lined with palm trees, eventually crossing a busy street in a commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with orange arched canopy

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the covered promenade, passing benches and planters

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: series of orange arched supports with transparent roof covering the walkway
small green and yellow booth structure at the promenade entrance
large red commercial vehicle parked ahead under the canopy
vertical billboard with purple background and product advertisement

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered waterfront promenade shaded by an orange arched canopy structure. The area features concrete benches, planters with greenery, and a few pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. A red delivery truck and purple advertisement stand are visible ahead as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza transition with stairs leading to street level

events.description: exits the covered canopy into open sunlight and urban plaza area
descends concrete stairs to reach street level

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered walkway and descending stairs to reach the street level sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red athletic wear walking up the stairs

entered.detail: tall multi-story building with glass facade and balconies
wide steps leading down from the promenade to street level
street with parked cars running parallel to the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into bright sunlight, approaching a set of concrete stairs leading down to street level. A modern glass tower rises on the right while pedestrians move in various directions. The character descends the stairs to reach the open waterfront sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees and ocean view

events.description: reaches open waterfront sidewalk with clear ocean view on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront sidewalk with the ocean on the left and traffic on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with yellow beanie and backpack walking alongside the character

entered.detail: row of tall palm trees lining the edge of the waterfront
open body of water visible beyond the promenade railing
tall blue poles with street lights along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open waterfront promenade with palm trees lining the left side and the ocean visible in the distance. The sidewalk runs parallel to a busy coastal road with moderate traffic on the right. Other pedestrians walk in the same direction, and the scene is bathed in bright midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with neon signage and crosswalk

events.description: character crosses the street at a crosswalk with other pedestrians
approaching commercial area with large pink neon billboard visible

agents.ego_description: crossing the coastal road at an intersection while moving toward a commercial district with large billboards

notable_agents.action: classic-style car driving along the road parallel to the character

entered.detail: large commercial billboard with pink neon lighting displaying TENTAC branding
green metal railing along the edge of the promenade
yellow billboard with FOLLOW YOUR INSTINCTS text and imagery

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the coastal road at a busy intersection, moving from the waterfront sidewalk toward a more commercial area. Large digital billboards and neon signs, including a prominent pink TENTAC sign, dominate the right side. The character walks alongside other pedestrians past a green railing with the ocean still visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded waterfront promenade into a bright, neon-lit commercial district. It begins under an orange arched canopy structure, passing concrete benches and a red delivery truck as the character moves forward. As the character emerges from the shade into bright midday sunlight, the camera follows them down a set of concrete stairs past a modern glass tower to reach the open waterfront sidewalk. The scene then expands along a palm-lined promenade parallel to a busy coastal road with the ocean visible in the distance. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they cross the road at a busy intersection, shifting from the natural coastline toward a dense urban area dominated by large digital billboards and a prominent pink TENTAC sign.
